channel.title: Digital-Twin on Reo Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Digital-Twin on Reo Blog

item.title: Digital Twin Simulation Streaming Relay Server
item.description: Goal Build a reliable digital twin service that controls and visualizes a traffic simulation derived from real-world traffic data. The backend sits between the simulation server and the front-end viewer, providing a stable API contract and twin-ready data. What I built Backend orchestrator layer between front-end and simulation server: Front-end uses a single domain API surface, without directly depending on simulation-specific protocols or schemas. Simulation control APIs (domainized): Create/run/stop simulation jobs, query status/progress, and fetch results.
